context: Tests whether the agent implements the merchandising health score with the prescribed dimension weights, correct normalisation formulas for each dimension, and handles edge cases like out-of-stock products and high returns correctly.

checklist.name: sellThrough weight
checklist.description: sellThrough dimension uses weight 0.25 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: pdpConversion weight
checklist.description: pdpConversion dimension uses weight 0.25 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: revenueRank weight
checklist.description: revenueRank dimension uses weight 0.20 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: reviews weight
checklist.description: reviews dimension uses weight 0.15 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: stockHealth weight
checklist.description: stockHealth dimension uses weight 0.10 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: returns weight
checklist.description: returns dimension uses weight 0.05 in the final score calculation

checklist.name: pdpConversion normalisation
checklist.description: pdpConversionPct is normalised by multiplying by 20 (so 5% CVR maps to 100), capped at 100 — A002 (pdpConversionPct=6.2) normalises to 100, not 124

checklist.name: revenueRank normalisation
checklist.description: revenueRank is normalised as max(0, 100 - (rank - 1) * 2), floored at 0 — rank 1 maps to 100, rank 7 maps to 88

checklist.name: reviews normalisation
checklist.description: reviewScore is normalised as ((reviewScore - 1) / 4) * 100 — a score of 1.0 maps to 0, 5.0 maps to 100

checklist.name: stockHealth OOS handling
checklist.description: stockHealth is 0 when daysOnHand is 0 or negative (out of stock) — A003 (daysOnHand=-5) and A006 (daysOnHand=0) must both get stockHealth score of 0

checklist.name: stockHealth cap
checklist.description: stockHealth is capped at 100 even when daysOnHand exceeds 100 — A008 (daysOnHand=110) normalises to stockHealth of 100, not 110

checklist.name: returns normalisation
checklist.description: returnsRate is normalised as max(0, 100 - returnsRate * 5), floored at 0 — A006 (returnsRate=30) maps to 0 (not negative), A003 (returnsRate=22) also maps to 0
